visual_summary: A component that animates text sliding up word by word. Suitable for adding a dynamic touch to text content on web pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Text Animate Demo 3
Description: A component that animates text sliding up word by word. Suitable for adding a dynamic touch to text content on web pages.
Style: 
Interactions: animated
Tags: text-animation, animation, dynamic-content

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { TextAnimate } from "@/registry/magicui/text-animate"

export default function TextAnimateDemo3() {
  return (
    <TextAnimate animation="slideUp" by="word">
      Slide up by word
    </TextAnimate>
  )
}
